title: Introduction to ORMs Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Object-Relational Mapping (ORM) and its benefits.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of an ORM?
options: To map database tables to object-oriented classes
To distribute static assets to a CDN

questions.question: Which of these is a benefit of using an ORM?
options: Elimination of the need for any database architecture
Increased performance for all complex queries
Requirement to write manual SQL for all CRUD operations

questions.question: Which of these is a popular ORM for JavaScript/TypeScript?
What is the main advantage of database independence provided by many ORMs?
options: Not needing to know which database your app uses
Easier switching of underlying databases with minimal code changes
Automatic conversion of SQL to NoSQL databases
Ability to run multiple databases simultaneously

questions.question: Most ORMs help improve security by automatically handling what common vulnerability?
